name: get_channel_info
description: Valid channel list for a community space (channel id and name). Use channel_id in other MCP tools.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_overview_metrics
description: Overall community metrics in a date range: post/reply counts, sentiment counts, per-channel breakdown (concrete counts, not ratios). Useful for automated daily digests.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_sentiment_overview
description: Sentiment distribution and hot-keyword overview: top keywords per sentiment with trends, plus overall keyword ranking. Use to gauge mood and spot emerging topics.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_tag_trends
description: Daily tag trends: given tagCode and date range, returns counts and time series per tag value.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_risk_content
description: List content flagged as risk/moderation items; filter by risk type and time. For agents that poll new risk items or alert ops. Optional trend aggregates.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_corpus_tags
description: List corpus tags (tagId, tagCode, tagName, inferenceType) to pick tagCode for filters.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_comment_tag_analysis
description: Comment tag analysis: for a tagCode, counts and trends per tag value over time.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_comments_summary
description: Comment analytics summary for a post: sentiment mix and time trends. Aggregate stats only—no raw comment list.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_post_detail
description: Full detail for one post/video: body, media, subtitles, danmu, sentiment, keywords, topics, tag values, and comment pager.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: search_posts
description: Search social posts/videos/feeds in a community space. Filter by channel, keywords, sentiment, corpus tagFilters (see params; use get_corpus_tags for tagCode/inferenceType), time range, etc.Each row includes tags (tagCode, tagName, inferenceType, values) plus title, summary, platform, author, publish time, sentiment, keywords, engagement.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_livestream_overview
description: Livestream overview trends: active rooms, session count, interactions, and streamed duration.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_livestream_rooms
description: Search live rooms by time range and channels; returns room list with stats.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_livestream_room_metrics
description: Core metrics and yearly calendar for one room: overview KPIs plus daily streamed-duration calendar.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_livestream_list
description: List live sessions for a room in a time range (stream records).

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_livestream_detail
description: One live session detail: interaction leaderboards and paginated interaction feed.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_livestream_analysis
description: AI-generated live session analysis report: highlight moments (time slices with metrics and AI insights) and sentiment opinions.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_daily_summary
description: Daily community summary for a given date: hot topic rankings and highlighted opinions (positive/negative). Core tool for agents to build structured digests.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_hot_topics
description: Hot topics leaderboard over a time range.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param

name: get_topic_detail
description: Deep stats for one topic in a range: content/reply totals, sentiment (POSITIVE/NEGATIVE/NEUTRAL), per-channel daily trends, hot keywords. Prefer topicId from get_hot_topics.

arguments.description: Identifier of the community space. SpaceId
arguments.name: spaceId
param
